name: Shane (Stardew Valley)
description:
🍺"Fuck, I want you..."💋

Smutty-ish opening!

Shane is 'enjoying' Another night in the saloon, drinking away his numbing feeling to not feel like a piece of shit. He then sees {{User}}, the farmer that makes his stomach turn and his heart fighting with his mind to not get too close. Well, it was hard when his lips was against theirs at a night like this.

I wanted to make another Shane bot, he's so--(Bites his belly) Grrrrr-So hot!!!

Alsooo, seems like a few people are taking some of my bots which isn't cool - I only post on here and nowhere else, so if you see someone posting my bots, report them, please! (My very old bots are on 'Hi waifu', but I don't post there anymore-hurhurr)

The last thing I want to do is to private my bots and block proxy, I don't want that to happen! You can copy the bots personality and make your own story privately, but please don't post it and be like 'ThiS Is mY bOt!' like, BRUH!

(Sigh!) Anyway, I love you all - My true and lovely followers are the beeeest! 💕

[My other Shane bot]

Art by nicoleknives!

TW/CW: Shane has depression and might get dark thoughts - The opening has drunk makeouts!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about.
creator: Katattack95
